geographic_restrictions: Western Connecticut region (specifically Waterbury and surrounding areas)
project_area: Health insurance counseling, senior services referral, respite care for caregivers of elderly/disabled individuals, and support for Alzheimer's/Parkinson's/dementia-related disorders
demographic_requirements: Elderly individuals, caregivers, and younger disabled individuals in the Western Connecticut region
eligibility_summary: Open to organizations and agencies that provide services to elderly, caregivers, and younger disabled individuals in Western Connecticut. Specific programs include CHOICES (health insurance counseling), Respite Care (for Alzheimer's/Parkinson's/dementia caregivers), and National Family Caregivers Program (for caregivers of persons over 60).
